name: MOODYS CORP /DE/
summary: Moody's Corporation is a global provider of credit ratings, research, and risk assessment tools operating through two segments: Moody's Investors Service (MIS), which provides credit ratings across corporate finance, structured finance, financial institutions, and public/infrastructure finance; and Moody's Analytics (MA), which offers decision solutions, research and insights, and data and information products supporting banking, insurance, and KYC workflows.

products.name: Moody's Investors Service (MIS)
products.description: Credit rating agency providing ratings across corporate finance, structured finance, financial institutions, and public/project/infrastructure finance.

products.name: Decision Solutions
products.description: Subscription-based solutions supporting banking, insurance, and KYC workflows using data and research components.

products.name: Research and Insights
products.description: Research and analytical content for financial market participants within the MA segment.

products.name: Data and Information
products.description: Provides vast data sets on companies and securities via data feeds and data applications products.

products.name: Moody's Local
products.description: Ratings platform focused on providing credit rating services in Latin American capital markets.

products.name: Net Zero Assessments
products.description: Independent assessment of an entity's carbon transition plan relative to a global net zero pathway.

products.name: Numerated
products.description: Commercial lending platform acquired by Moody's in November 2024.

partnerships.partner_name: CCXI (China Cheng Xin International Credit Rating Co. Ltd.)
partnerships.description: Moody's owns 30% of CCXI, the first and largest domestic credit rating agency approved by the People's Bank of China.
Provider of credit ratings and research in India; Moody's holds an interest in ICRA.
Moody's acquired a minority investment in BitSight in 2021; provides cyber risk ratings and analytics.
Domestic credit rating agency spanning Africa; Moody's acquired a controlling financial interest in July 2024.
